# 故障报告 (Bug Report)

## 先决条件 (Prerequisites)

- [ ] 我已确认这个问题没有在[其他 issues](https://github.com/RuyiRepo/issues/issues)中提出过。I am sure that this problem has NEVER been discussed in [other issues](https://github.com/RuyiRepo/issues/issues).

## 概述 (Summary)

(简明扼要地描述遇到的问题。Please describe the issue you are encountering concisely and clearly.)

## 期望的正确行为 (What you expected to happen)

(描述你期望看到什么正确的结果。Please describe the correct outcome you expect to see.)

## 重现步骤 (How to reproduce it)

(如何一步步重现这个问题 - 这一步非常重要。How to reproduce this issue step by step—this step is crucial.)

## 相关日志或截图 (Relevant logs or screenshots)

(粘贴任何相关的日志或上传截图，可以使用代码块```来格式化输出。Please paste any relevant logs or upload screenshots. You may use code blocks for formatted output.)

## 环境 (Environments)

(说明操作系统、架构、包管理器等环境信息。Please specify the environment information, such as the operating system, architecture, package manager.)
